terminal_exception: AttributeError: 'DataFrame' object has no attribute 'end_cycle' in prefix_audit after numerical overflow made the target private-state calibration unavailable.
root_cause: The original unnormalised online update produced non-finite residuals; the prefix audit did not represent an unavailable private-state path explicitly.
corrective_changes: normalized LMS using the already pre-registered adapter learning rate
causal prefix-audit handling for an unavailable private-state path
